{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Creative Media Specialist",
  "description": "Key Retail Group - From late-night supplier negotiations to overcoming Amazon compliance challenges, our journey has been nothing short of an adventure. We embrace the spirit of innovators and problem-solvers, but we also acknowledge the hard truths&mdash;supplier hiccups, shipping nightmares, and the occasional compliance curveball. Every great experiment has its failures, and we&rsquo;ve had ours. But with an unwavering commitment to learning and growth, we dust ourselves off, recalibrate, and keep pushing forward. As a brand-building powerhouse, we thrive on competency, commitment, continuous learning, and teamwork&mdash;turning roadblocks into stepping stones. If you&rsquo;ve made it this far, you probably already have an idea of what it takes to be one of us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Creative Media Specialist
Job Location: Ojodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We&rsquo;re hiring a full-time Assistant Creative Media Specialist to enhance our brands with web design, graphics, photography, and videography.
	Ideal candidates excel in fast-paced environments, showcase creativity, and understand e-commerce, especially Amazon FBA.


Responsibilities
Graphics Design:


	Design high-quality graphics for use across digital platforms, including Amazon product listings, social media, websites, and marketing campaigns.
	Create compelling A+ Content and Brand Content for Amazon FBA, ensuring all designs meet platform requirements and enhance the customer experience.
	Develop visual content that adheres to brand guidelines, ensuring consistency across all media.
	Develop a distinctive product packaging design that will effectively differentiate both existing and new products in the market.


Label Design:


	Create and update product label artwork and layout files for new and existing SKUs
	Prepare print?ready label files, including correct resolution, colour mode (CMYK), and bleed for production
	Ensure all labels comply with brand guidelines (fonts, colours, logos, and slogan placement).
	Collaborate with marketing and product teams to translate campaign ideas into label visuals.


Product Mock-ups:


	Create realistic product mock-ups for new SKUs and marketing campaigns.
	Collaborate with marketing and product teams to turn briefs into compelling mock-ups that support sales and branding.
	A knowledge of Blender or animation software is highly desirable


Visual &amp; Marketing Creative Production:


	Create and manage visual content across channels, including website creative assets (banners, product images, landing?page graphics), email newsletters, and associated graphics, as well as posters, banners, and ad creatives for digital and print; ensuring consistent branding, clear messaging, and timely delivery for all graphics?related needs


Collaboration and Reporting:


	Work closely with the Product Manager&#39;s team, providing creative input and ensuring all visual content aligns with product strategies and marketing goals.
	Participate in daily reviews, submitting a detailed report of achievements and tasks completed, fostering a culture of accountability and continuous improvement.
	Adhere to established work processes, KPIs, and collaboration guidelines to ensure efficiency, consistency, and quality across all creative outputs.


Continuous Improvement:


	Stay up-to-date with the latest trends in web design, graphic design, photography, Marketing, and videography, implementing new techniques and tools to enhance the quality of our content.
	Participate in regular training sessions and workshops to continually improve your skill set and contribute to the growth of the Creative Media Specialist team.
	Provide constructive feedback to junior team members, supporting their development and ensuring a high standard of work across the team.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Graphic Design, Web Design, Visual Arts, or a related field.
	3 - 5 years of professional experience in Web Design, Graphics Design, Photography, and Videography.
	Proven experience in e-commerce, particularly with Amazon FBA, is highly desirable.
	Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects) and other relevant design and editing software.
	Strong understanding of SEO, UX/UI principles, and e-commerce best practices.
	Exceptional attention to detail, with a strong portfolio showcasing a range of web design, graphic design, photography, and videography projects.
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously, meeting tight deadlines without compromising quality.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment.
	Bonus points if you have knowledge of Amazon FBA operations!.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates shouldsend their CV to: recruitment@keyretailgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-31",

Assistant Creative Media Specialist Job at Key Retail Group




        
    

        
        Key Retail Group - From late-night supplier negotiations to overcoming Amazon compliance challenges, our journey has been nothing short of an adventure. We embrace the spirit of innovators and problem-solvers, but we also acknowledge the hard truths—supplier hiccups, shipping nightmares, and the occasional compliance curveball. Every great experiment has its failures, and we’ve had ours. But with an unwavering commitment to learning and growth, we dust ourselves off, recalibrate, and keep pushing forward. As a brand-building powerhouse, we thrive on competency, commitment, continuous learning, and teamwork—turning roadblocks into stepping stones. If you’ve made it this far, you probably already have an idea of what it takes to be one of us.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Creative Media Specialist
Job Location: Ojodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We’re hiring a full-time Assistant Creative Media Specialist to enhance our brands with web design, graphics, photography, and videography.
	Ideal candidates excel in fast-paced environments, showcase creativity, and understand e-commerce, especially Amazon FBA.


Responsibilities
Graphics Design:


	Design high-quality graphics for use across digital platforms, including Amazon product listings, social media, websites, and marketing campaigns.
	Create compelling A+ Content and Brand Content for Amazon FBA, ensuring all designs meet platform requirements and enhance the customer experience.
	Develop visual content that adheres to brand guidelines, ensuring consistency across all media.
	Develop a distinctive product packaging design that will effectively differentiate both existing and new products in the market.


Label Design:


	Create and update product label artwork and layout files for new and existing SKUs
	Prepare print?ready label files, including correct resolution, colour mode (CMYK), and bleed for production
	Ensure all labels comply with brand guidelines (fonts, colours, logos, and slogan placement).
	Collaborate with marketing and product teams to translate campaign ideas into label visuals.


Product Mock-ups:


	Create realistic product mock-ups for new SKUs and marketing campaigns.
	Collaborate with marketing and product teams to turn briefs into compelling mock-ups that support sales and branding.
	A knowledge of Blender or animation software is highly desirable


Visual & Marketing Creative Production:


	Create and manage visual content across channels, including website creative assets (banners, product images, landing?page graphics), email newsletters, and associated graphics, as well as posters, banners, and ad creatives for digital and print; ensuring consistent branding, clear messaging, and timely delivery for all graphics?related needs


Collaboration and Reporting:


	Work closely with the Product Manager's team, providing creative input and ensuring all visual content aligns with product strategies and marketing goals.
	Participate in daily reviews, submitting a detailed report of achievements and tasks completed, fostering a culture of accountability and continuous improvement.
	Adhere to established work processes, KPIs, and collaboration guidelines to ensure efficiency, consistency, and quality across all creative outputs.


Continuous Improvement:


	Stay up-to-date with the latest trends in web design, graphic design, photography, Marketing, and videography, implementing new techniques and tools to enhance the quality of our content.
	Participate in regular training sessions and workshops to continually improve your skill set and contribute to the growth of the Creative Media Specialist team.
	Provide constructive feedback to junior team members, supporting their development and ensuring a high standard of work across the team.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Graphic Design, Web Design, Visual Arts, or a related field.
	3 - 5 years of professional experience in Web Design, Graphics Design, Photography, and Videography.
	Proven experience in e-commerce, particularly with Amazon FBA, is highly desirable.
	Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects) and other relevant design and editing software.
	Strong understanding of SEO, UX/UI principles, and e-commerce best practices.
	Exceptional attention to detail, with a strong portfolio showcasing a range of web design, graphic design, photography, and videography projects.
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously, meeting tight deadlines without compromising quality.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment.
	Bonus points if you have knowledge of Amazon FBA operations!.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates shouldsend their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Administrative and Support Staff",
  "description": "Carpa Healthcare is a B2B medical equipment supplier that focuses on making quality healthcare and products of healthcare technologies accessible at a reasonable cost.

We are a private limited liability company providing medical technology solutions to both public and private health sector operators globally. We partner with leading global innovators, developers and manufacturers of medical technology devices.
Our markets include but not limited to UK, United States, United Arab Emirates, Nigeria, Ghana, India, South Africa, Namibia, Nepal, Nigeria and many more.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative and Support Staff
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Administrative and support staff ensure organizational efficiency by managing clerical tasks, daily operations, and communication.
	Core responsibilities include scheduling meetings, handling correspondence, maintaining records, managing office supplies, and supporting staff, acting as a crucial link for productive office environments.


Key Responsibilities &amp; Functions


	Office Administration: Maintaining filing systems (physical/electronic), inventory management, and managing office equipment.
	Communication &amp; Support: Answering phone calls, managing calendars, scheduling appointments, and preparing reports or presentations.
	Logistics &amp; Coordination: Organizing meetings, handling travel arrangements, and event coordination.
	Financial Tasks: Performing basic bookkeeping, managing expense reports, and processing


Essential Skills


	Communication: High-level verbal and written communication.
	Technical: Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and database management.
	Organizational: Time management, multitasking, and attention to detail.
	Interpersonal: Ability to interact with clients and staff professionally.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their Documents to: carpahealthcare.hr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Administrative and Support Staff Job at Carpa Healthcare




        
    

        
        Carpa Healthcare is a B2B medical equipment supplier that focuses on making quality healthcare and products of healthcare technologies accessible at a reasonable cost.

We are a private limited liability company providing medical technology solutions to both public and private health sector operators globally. We partner with leading global innovators, developers and manufacturers of medical technology devices.
Our markets include but not limited to UK, United States, United Arab Emirates, Nigeria, Ghana, India, South Africa, Namibia, Nepal, Nigeria and many more.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative and Support Staff
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Administrative and support staff ensure organizational efficiency by managing clerical tasks, daily operations, and communication.
	Core responsibilities include scheduling meetings, handling correspondence, maintaining records, managing office supplies, and supporting staff, acting as a crucial link for productive office environments.


Key Responsibilities & Functions


	Office Administration: Maintaining filing systems (physical/electronic), inventory management, and managing office equipment.
	Communication & Support: Answering phone calls, managing calendars, scheduling appointments, and preparing reports or presentations.
	Logistics & Coordination: Organizing meetings, handling travel arrangements, and event coordination.
	Financial Tasks: Performing basic bookkeeping, managing expense reports, and processing


Essential Skills


	Communication: High-level verbal and written communication.
	Technical: Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and database management.
	Organizational: Time management, multitasking, and attention to detail.
	Interpersonal: Ability to interact with clients and staff professionally.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their Documents to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

  "title": "IT Analyst",
  "description": "Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today&rsquo;s dynamic and diverse market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Analyst

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for an IT Analyst to design and implement functional and cost-efficient IT systems.


Responsibilities


	Communicate with stakeholders to understand their requirements
	Develop and analyze functional specifications
	Design efficient IT systems to meet business and technology needs
	Coordinate developers to build and implement technology solutions
	Integrate multiple systems and reconcile needs of different teams
	Gather feedback from end users about system performance
	Plan and oversee projects (e.g. upgrades, hardware/software installations)
	Provide advice and technical training
	Keep abreast of technology trends and developments.


Requirements


	Experience in project management
	Knowledge of databases, system security and troubleshooting
	Understanding of business practices
	Excellent communication skills
	Analytical mindset
	Problem-solving aptitude.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: nikemfollimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

IT Analyst Job at Nikemfol




        
    

        
        Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today’s dynamic and diverse market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Analyst

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an IT Analyst to design and implement functional and cost-efficient IT systems.


Responsibilities


	Communicate with stakeholders to understand their requirements
	Develop and analyze functional specifications
	Design efficient IT systems to meet business and technology needs
	Coordinate developers to build and implement technology solutions
	Integrate multiple systems and reconcile needs of different teams
	Gather feedback from end users about system performance
	Plan and oversee projects (e.g. upgrades, hardware/software installations)
	Provide advice and technical training
	Keep abreast of technology trends and developments.


Requirements


	Experience in project management
	Knowledge of databases, system security and troubleshooting
	Understanding of business practices
	Excellent communication skills
	Analytical mindset
	Problem-solving aptitude.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Representative",
  "description": "Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today&rsquo;s dynamic and diverse market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Representative

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a pleasant Front Desk Representative to undertake all receptionist and clerical duties at the desk of our main entrance.


Responsibilities


	Keep front desk tidy and presentable with all necessary material (pens, forms, paper etc.)
	Greet and welcome guests
	Answer questions and address complaints
	Answer all incoming calls and redirect them or keep messages
	Receive letters, packages etc. and distribute them
	Prepare outgoing mail by drafting correspondence, securing parcels etc.
	Check, sort and forward emails
	Monitor office supplies and place orders when necessary
	Keep updated records and files
	Monitor office expenses and costs
	Take up other duties as assigned (travel arrangements, schedules etc.)


Requirements


	Familiarity with office machines (e.g. fax, printer etc.)
	Knowledge of office management and basic bookkeeping
	Proficient in English (oral and written)
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office (especially Excel and Word)
	Strong communication and people skills
	Good organizational and multi-tasking abilities
	Problem-solving skills
	Customer service orientation.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: nikemfollimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Representative Job at Nikemfol




        
    

        
        Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today’s dynamic and diverse market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Representative

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a pleasant Front Desk Representative to undertake all receptionist and clerical duties at the desk of our main entrance.


Responsibilities


	Keep front desk tidy and presentable with all necessary material (pens, forms, paper etc.)
	Greet and welcome guests
	Answer questions and address complaints
	Answer all incoming calls and redirect them or keep messages
	Receive letters, packages etc. and distribute them
	Prepare outgoing mail by drafting correspondence, securing parcels etc.
	Check, sort and forward emails
	Monitor office supplies and place orders when necessary
	Keep updated records and files
	Monitor office expenses and costs
	Take up other duties as assigned (travel arrangements, schedules etc.)


Requirements


	Familiarity with office machines (e.g. fax, printer etc.)
	Knowledge of office management and basic bookkeeping
	Proficient in English (oral and written)
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office (especially Excel and Word)
	Strong communication and people skills
	Good organizational and multi-tasking abilities
	Problem-solving skills
	Customer service orientation.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "description": "Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are looking for a Receptionist to manage our front desk on a daily basis and to perform a variety of administrative and clerical tasks.


Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests as soon as they arrive at the office
	Direct visitors to the appropriate person and office
	Answer, screen and forward incoming phone calls
	Ensure reception area is tidy and presentable, with all necessary stationery and material (e.g. pens, forms and brochures)
	Provide basic and accurate information in-person and via phone/email
	Receive, sort and distribute daily mail/deliveries
	Maintain office security by following safety procedures and controlling access via the reception desk (monitor logbook, issue visitor badges)
	Order front office supplies and keep inventory of stock
	Update calendars and schedule meetings
	Arrange travel and accommodations, and prepare vouchers
	Keep updated records of office expenses and costs
	Perform other clerical receptionist duties such as filing, photocopying, transcribing and faxing.


Requirements


	Work experience as a Receptionist, Front Office Representative or similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Hands-on experience with office equipment (e.g. fax machines and printers)
	Professional attitude and appearance
	Solid written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to be resourceful and proactive when issues arise
	Excellent organizational skills
	Multitasking and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks
	Customer service attitude.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: nikemfollimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Receptionist Job at Nikemfol




        
    

        
        Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today’s dynamic and diverse market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary

	We are looking for a Receptionist to manage our front desk on a daily basis and to perform a variety of administrative and clerical tasks.


Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests as soon as they arrive at the office
	Direct visitors to the appropriate person and office
	Answer, screen and forward incoming phone calls
	Ensure reception area is tidy and presentable, with all necessary stationery and material (e.g. pens, forms and brochures)
	Provide basic and accurate information in-person and via phone/email
	Receive, sort and distribute daily mail/deliveries
	Maintain office security by following safety procedures and controlling access via the reception desk (monitor logbook, issue visitor badges)
	Order front office supplies and keep inventory of stock
	Update calendars and schedule meetings
	Arrange travel and accommodations, and prepare vouchers
	Keep updated records of office expenses and costs
	Perform other clerical receptionist duties such as filing, photocopying, transcribing and faxing.


Requirements


	Work experience as a Receptionist, Front Office Representative or similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Hands-on experience with office equipment (e.g. fax machines and printers)
	Professional attitude and appearance
	Solid written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to be resourceful and proactive when issues arise
	Excellent organizational skills
	Multitasking and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks
	Customer service attitude.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.
